pleaseIncludeTheFollowingInformationInYo: Please include the following information in your email:
readyToReuniteWithYourPetHere39sHowToGet: Ready to reunite with your pet? Here's how to get started:
text1: Lost your pet? Found a lost pet? SpotAPaw reunites pets with families faster — powered by AI.
text10: Sign up with your email or social media to start posting and receiving alerts.
text11: Add a photo, description, and contact info to have everything ready in an emergency.
text12: Lost or found a pet? Snap a photo, let our AI do the rest, and share it with your community in seconds.
text13: Enable notifications to get real-time updates on sightings and matches.
text14: We will process your request within 7 days and confirm once your data or account has been deleted.
text15: Thank you to everyone who provided feedback and suggestions to help us improve SpotAPaw.
text16: Thank you for being part of the SpotAPaw community and helping pets find their way home! 🏠🐕🐱
text2: SpotAPaw is a community-powered app that uses AI to automatically generate detailed pet descriptions from photos, so you can post a detailed lost or found pet report quickly.
text3: Snap a photo and let our AI instantly describe breed, color, markings, and size — no guessing required.
text4: See lost pet reports and community sightings pinned to your neighborhood the moment they're posted.
text5: Get notified the second a pet matching your missing animal is spotted nearby.
text6: Build a detailed profile once — photo, description, microchip, and contact info — ready to share in an emergency.
text7: Thousands of local pet lovers watching, sharing, and helping bring animals home.
text8: When every minute counts, SpotAPaw gives your community the tools to act fast.
text9: Join our community today and help us create a safer world for our furry friends!
